sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move DOWN to align red blocks with green hole
result = action(['DOWN'])
print("Result:", result)

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}] cols=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}]")

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== AFTER DOWN ===")
for r in range(29, 50):
    print(f"{r:2d}: {ascii_lines[r][26:50]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
